title: Folder Templates

posts.author: Mcgray (Mark Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
just curious if monday.com is working on creating a feature where I can save a whole folder as a template. Our company flips houses, we use Monday to track our process with each house and we track multiple factors as in budgeting, and contractor bids per house.
It would cut out a step on our side if we could save a folder as a template instead of creating a folder and adding all of our templates individually. It would also help our project manager from setting it up and possibly miss a board.

If someone knows how to do this please fill me in

Thank you!!
